title: Cool Veinminer
description: Fully Customizable Veinminer with a simple Configuration GUI to make easier the process
body:
![Title](https://i.postimg.cc/rF9SkSDf/logo.png)

[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/tFmJ75xp86) [![patreon-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/patreon-singular_64h.png)](https://www.patreon.com/cw/canvasofsouls) [![github-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/github-plural_64h.png)](https://github.com/Coconite/Coconite-Datapacks)

# 📖 Description

Tired of datapacks/mods that can't be customized or their customization is a painful experience?

Don't worry, we have you covered!

This Veinminer isn't like the other ones, we have a Visual and Intuitive GUI where you can configure all you want.

## Get Started
Obtain a Configurer using the button in the pause menu

![Button](https://i.postimg.cc/pLsVRdYy/menu.png)

Or use the command

```hs
/trigger c.cv.configurer.trigger
```

Once you have this item, don't move and do Right Click

![Item](https://i.postimg.cc/4x2GjSsn/item.png)

This GUI will show up.

![Main](https://i.postimg.cc/wv9KxCVg/main.png)

There are 3 Sections:

1. Items
2. Blocks
3. Extra Configuration

## Items

In order to use Cool Veinminer, you will need to put the items you want to be detected at the moment of breaking blocks in this page.

By default, there will be all the Vanilla Pickaxes, you can add Axes, Shovels, Hoes, Etc. And even items from mods.

![items](https://i.postimg.cc/0Q9g5Tfx/pickaxes.png)

Using the Red Button, you can go back to the Main Section (If you are on the 1st page, otherwise you will go back to the previous page) and using the Green Button you can go to the next page.

<details>
<summary>Note</summary>

You can press Esc to close the GUI, if you don't move the Configurer from your Main Hand, the Section and Page you had will stay there until you change the item of your Main Hand.

![GUI](https://i.postimg.cc/4yyb2y54/show-gui.gif)

</details>

## Blocks

For using Cool Veinminer, you also will need to put all the blocks you want in this page.

By default, there will be all the Vanilla Ores, you can add every block you want but be careful.

![Blocks](https://i.postimg.cc/Wb51BnsD/blocks.png)

You can make groups of blocks that will act like the same block (Will connect for veinmining) using bundles.

![Bundle](https://i.postimg.cc/XvFVFg6p/bundle.png)

![Bundle_show](https://i.postimg.cc/qMGZ5609/bundle_show.gif)

## Extra Configuration

Here you can configure the way Cool Veinminer works:

1. Shift Needed to Work
2. Maxium Size of Vein
3. Op Needed to Configure

By default, everyone even without **OP** can configure Cool Veinminer but if this bothers you, disable it!

Enabling OP needed will remove all the Configurers of **online players** and make you need OP to obtain a new one.

![Extra_Config](https://i.postimg.cc/qRpfBPLd/extra_config.png)

---

## 🤔 FAQ

> Q : Is there any limit to the items and blocks i can put on the GUI?

A : Only for the items, you can put a maximum of 5k items.


> Q : I dont want everyone being able to configure the veinminer.

A : Disable it in the Extra Configuration!

> Q : Do I need creative mode to configure?

A : You can configure Cool Veinminer in survival mode but its harder, you will need to obtain all the materials with Silk Touch for it. But by default, theres configured all the Vanilla Ores and Pickaxes.

---
